summary: Tested Replay Insights integration with Weekly Behavioral Report feature for Philos Orientation app. Backend API /api/memory/replay-insights/{user_id} fully working (12/12 tests passed). Frontend WeeklyBehavioralReportSection.js correctly implemented with replay integration section that appears when replayCount > 0. The integration requires decision chains (parent_decision_id relationships) for the report to render.

minor.issue: Console warning: polyline attribute points Expected number - SVG using percentage strings instead of numeric values

issues: Console warning about polyline points attribute using percentage strings - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: WeeklyBehavioralReportSection.js correctly fetches replay insights via useEffect on line 40-63
replayComparison memo on lines 279-378 correctly calculates mostExploredAlt, missedPositive, avoidedRisky, and gapAnalysis
Replay integration section renders conditionally when replayComparison.replayCount > 0 (line 612)

All required data-testids present: weekly-behavioral-report-section, replay-integration-section, actual-vs-replay-comparison, most-explored-stat, missed-positive-stat, avoided-risky-stat, gap-analysis, replay-insight-{idx}
Hebrew RTL layout correctly implemented with dir='rtl' attribute
SVG comparison chart on lines 631-682 displays 'בחירות בפועל vs הפעלות חוזרות'
Stats grid on lines 686-710 shows: הכי נבדק (most explored), הוחמץ (missed), נמנע (avoided)
Gap analysis section on lines 713-730 shows when significant difference exists
Hebrew replay insights display correctly via replayInsightTexts array (lines 733-747)

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works, replay integration section requires chain data

seed_data_creation: Test user has 6 replays with alternative path data (contribution: 3, order: 2, recovery: 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly Behavioral Report with Replay Integration fully implemented. Backend API /api/memory/replay-insights/{user_id} returns: total_replays, alternative_path_counts, transition_patterns, blind_spots, most_replayed_original_tags, insights (Hebrew), recent_replay_count. Frontend WeeklyBehavioralReportSection shows replay integration section when: 1) Decision chains exist (parent_decision_id), 2) replayCount > 0. The section displays SVG comparison chart, stats grid (most explored, missed positive, avoided risky), gap analysis, and Hebrew insights.

Weekly Behavioral Report section appears with chains
Replay integration section appears when replayCount > 0
